description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a hooded sweatshirt with a graphic design on the front and graffiti-style writing on the back. He wears a baseball cap, straight-cut pants, and classic lace-up sneakers, giving him a relaxed, streetwise appearance. A small pouch or bag is strapped to his right hip, suggesting he may be carrying personal items. His hands are relaxed at his sides, and his facial expression is neutral, with short hair visible beneath the cap. The clothing appears to be made of typical fabric materials, and the overall build is average for an adult male. The figure is well-proportioned and suitable for contemporary city environments.
description: A casually dressed adult male pedestrian in a hoodie, cap, pants, and sneakers, with a small hip pouch and a relaxed stance. Urban streetwear style with graphic and graffiti details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hooded sweatshirt's graphic, the baseball cap, and the relaxed, symmetrical stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the cap, the pouch on the hip, and the straight fit of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the graffiti-style writing on the back of the hoodie and the back of the cap.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the other profile, the pouch's strap, and the overall silhouette.
attribute_clothing_type: casual hooded sweatshirt, straight-cut pants, baseball cap, and a small hip pouch
